generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a citizen, I believe we can't afford to be naive about security. The recent attacks in European cities show what happens when we don't give our agencies the tools they need. Some say we're sacrificing freedoms, but isn't it more dangerous to leave our families vulnerable? We need expanded powers to stop threats before they happen. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFamilies
